name: Western Union
description_short: At 1829 Everman Pkwy in Everman, TX 76140, Western Union offers check cashing and money transfer services. Call +1 817-349-9981 for more information.
description_long: This Western Union location functions as a local agent for the Western Union money transfer network. Typical services at branded agent locations include sending and receiving domestic and international wire transfers, purchasing money orders, and making bill payments. Specific services, hours, and fees vary by location — contact the store directly using the phone number above for current availability.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.49% APR for new vehicles
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit purchases (up to $400 per cycle)
NCUA-insured deposits providing member protection on accounts
Multiple physical branch locations across Tulsa and surrounding areas with drive-through and ATM access
Free auto-buying resource to help members research vehicles
Certificate rates up to 3.46% APY available
Active community involvement with financial education resources and member events
cons: Membership restricted to eligible individuals in service area (not open to all consumers)
Limited geographic footprint compared to national banks or larger credit unions
Money market rates relatively modest at 1.20% APY
Boat loan rates at 7.64% APR are higher than auto loan offerings
Service area appears concentrated in Oklahoma only with limited expansion
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto financing with member-owned institution benefits
Individuals looking for cash-back rewards on debit card purchases through checking accounts
Community-focused consumers who value local branch access and personalized service
Members eligible to join who want NCUA-insured deposit safety with competitive rates
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma residents eligible for membership who want competitive auto loan rates and basic deposit products from a member-owned, not-for-profit institution. The primary limitation is that membership is restricted to specific eligible individuals within their service area, making it inaccessible to out-of-state consumers or those outside their field of membership.
services: Auto loans (new and used vehicles, 5.49% APR advertised rate)
Kasasa Cash Back Checking (3% cash back on debit purchases)
meta_title: Western Sun — Credit Union in Broken Arrow, OK | CreditDoc
meta_description: Western Sun — NCUA-insured credit union in Broken Arrow, OK. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
